_instructions: Curated projects. Each card renders a generative cover derived from `seed` + `accent`. Add real repo/paper links only when they exist.
note: Publications and course/research projects. Boilerplate and forked repositories are intentionally left off.

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction
projects.description: ML and neural-network models predicting customer churn in banking and telecom, reaching 87.05% and 81.93% accuracy respectively. Published as a book chapter with Springer.

projects.title: Cloud Computing Security Survey
projects.description: A survey of security threats across cloud service models (SaaS / PaaS / IaaS / BaaS) and their mitigations, published and indexed on IEEE Xplore.

projects.title: Video Shot Detection
projects.description: A scene-change detector for video that combines frame-level color comparison with audio analysis via Librosa to find shot boundaries more reliably than either signal alone.

projects.title: Product Search — Android
projects.description: An Android app with a Node.js backend that queries the eBay API and renders responsive product-search results.

projects.title: eBay Data Web App
projects.description: A dynamic Angular + Node.js web app that mirrors core eBay flows, wiring TypeScript API calls to render structured, user-specific results.

projects.title: E-commerce Trend Mining
projects.description: Sentiment analysis and text mining across brands to anticipate consumer preferences, feeding data-mining models that refine product recommendations.
